subcodes.first_line: This is a Book unto him who hath believed in God, the Lord of Eternity. Blessed art thou, O servant, for from thy loins hath appeared one who hath attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب لمن آمن بالله مالک القدم طوبی لک یا عبد بما ظهر لله من صلبک من فاز
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @consolation and comfort
